commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR flattens cron tool model-facing schemas to OpenAPI-friendly shapes, refreshes affected Codex prompt snapshots, and adjusts one phone-control test Promise executor to satisfy lint.

PR surface: Source +21, Tests -16. Total +5 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: applying the PR's schema flattening leaves `src/agents/tools/cron-tool.test.ts` asserting `anyOf` on the same fields. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can update the stale cron-tool schema assertions and rerun the targeted checks without needing a product decision.

target.title: fix(ci): restore cron schema snapshots
target.body:
## Summary
- restores cron tool model-facing schemas to plain OpenAPI-friendly object/string/array shapes while keeping runtime null-clearing semantics in descriptions
- refreshes the affected Codex prompt snapshots
- fixes the phone-control test lint regression from returning `setImmediate` inside a Promise executor

## Real behavior proof
- Behavior addressed: current PR CI was failing on `check-lint`, `check-additional-extension-bundled`, `checks-node-core-fast`, and `prompt:snapshots:check` because the cron schema snapshots drifted and phone-control had a Promise-executor lint regression.
- Real environment tested: main-based OpenClaw gwt with shared repo `node_modules` symlink.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/cron-tool.schema.test.ts extensions/phone-control/index.test.ts`; `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs extensions/phone-control/index.test.ts src/agents/tools/cron-tool.ts`; `node --import tsx scripts/generate-prompt-snapshots.ts --check`; `git diff --check`.
- Evidence after fix: targeted Vitest passed 2 files / 29 tests; oxlint exited 0; prompt snapshot check reported `Prompt snapshots are current (7 files).`; `git diff --check` exited 0.
- Observed result after fix: cron schema assertions pass, phone-control lint target passes, and generated prompt snapshots match the committed fixtures.
- What was not tested: full repo check; CI is running that broad proof on this PR.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/cron-tool.schema.test.ts extensions/phone-control/index.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs extensions/phone-control/index.test.ts src/agents/tools/cron-tool.ts`
- `node --import tsx scripts/generate-prompt-snapshots.ts --check`
- `git diff --check`
target.author: vincentkoc

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
